missions.title: Reproduction - Section 1
missions.description: Comprehensive analysis covering flower structure, microsporogenesis, megasporogenesis and more.

microtargets.title: Flower structure
mustKnowFacts: Flower structure is a fundamental subtopic of Reproduction.
Crucial to understand the principles governing Flower structure for NEET.

diagrams.name: Diagram showing flower structure
commonLabelTraps: Confusing Part A with Part B in flower structure

commonTraps: Students often misinterpret Flower structure during complex MCQs.
Failing to apply the correct logic for Flower structure.
masteryCriteria: Can accurately solve numericals or identify structures related to Flower structure.
pyqPatterns: Past year questions frequently ask about Flower structure.

activeRecallQuestions.question: Explain the core concept behind Flower structure.
